/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/QuickDraft_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/DataStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/HotkeyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/widgets/NoteItemWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/widgets/ClipItemWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/src/widgets/KeybindPill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuickDraft.dir/QuickDraft_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o QuickDraft.app/Contents/MacOS/QuickDraft -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
